title: Phoenix Platform Foundation
description: Phoenix 1.8.3 + Elixir 1.19.5 app scaffold. Ecto schemas with binary_id PKs, PostgreSQL, Azure Container Apps deployment.

title: Authentication System
description: phx.gen.auth with email/password, session management, RBAC roles (user/therapist/org_admin/admin), 2FA via TOTP.

title: Therapist Seed Data
description: 109 SVG icon assets + therapist profiles seeded from React source repo. Seed orchestrator at priv/repo/seeds.exs.

title: Therapist Directory
description: Google-style therapist discovery with search, filters, verified badges, and profile cards. Gated by quiz completion (Phase 23).

title: Therapy Connect (Swipe Match)
description: Tinder-style swipe matching interface with compatibility scoring. Quiz > Match funnel redirects here after quiz completion.

title: 72+ Self-Assessment Quizzes
description: PHQ-9, GAD-7, PSS-10, Burnout, ADHD, PCL-5, ISI, SPIN, Resilience, WHO-5. Stepper UI with draft persistence and crisis detection.

title: Coach AI - AI Wellness Coaching
description: 24/7 AI-powered wellness coaching with session memory, crisis detection (PHQ-9 Q9), and safety boundary checks. Max 4096 tokens.

title: Admin Portal - 15 Management Tabs
description: Directory, quiz builder, audit log, compliance, AI research (SerpAPI), user management, feature flags, analytics, billing, org management.

title: Organization Portal
description: Calendar, messaging, directory management, SSO configuration, HIPAA compliance dashboard, seat management with live refresh.

title: Therapist Dashboard
description: Schedule management, availability settings, client roster with pagination, session notes, inquiry management.

title: User Dashboard
description: PERMA-V analytics engine (3,342 lines), messaging, favorites, Coach AI conversations, quiz history, booking management.

title: RBAC Admin-Only Live Session
description: Separate :admin_only live_session with ensure_admin on_mount guard. Role-based route protection.

title: Stripe + PayPal Payments
description: Stripe real integration (stripity_stripe ~>3.2), PayPal Orders API v2, subscription paywalls, webhook handlers.

title: TipTap WYSIWYG Editor
description: Rich text editing hook with Firefox 121 phx:page-loading-start fix. Used in messaging and org portal.

title: Real-Time Messaging
description: Therapist-user messaging LiveView with real-time PubSub, read receipts, and conversation threading.

title: Email System (Swoosh + SendGrid)
description: Transactional email via Swoosh adapter with SendGrid. UAT email notifications, OTP verification.

title: Search Autocomplete
description: Type-ahead search with debounced queries, result highlighting, and therapist profile quick-view cards.

title: Organization Invitation System
description: Token-based org invitations with role assignment, expiry, and onboarding flow.

title: Open Beta Feature Flags
description: Runtime feature flag rules UI in admin portal. Per-role, per-org gating for beta features.

title: Coach AI Crisis Detection
description: PHQ-9 Q9 self-harm detection triggers crisis modal with 988 hotline, safety plan resources, and session escalation.

title: Quiz > Match Funnel Gating
description: QuizGates on_mount callback enforces quiz completion before /directory access. Coach AI routes bypass gate.

title: Quiz Option Selection Bug Fix
description: Fixed persistent bug where option selection always highlighted first option. Switched from value-based to index-based option reconciliation.

title: CTA Typewriter Animation
description: CustomSelect hook with typewriter cycling (type > hold > delete > next), blinking block cursor, staggered offset between selects.

title: Live Style Guide + AG-UI Doc Panel
description: Auto-generated style guide from CSS/Tailwind tokens, What's New modal, version-locked documentation.

title: FB Group Market Research
description: 5,869 posts from 17 therapist FB groups analyzed. 75% pre-launch PMF: 6/8 top feature signals already built.

title: UAT Submission System
description: OTP-authenticated tester portal, bug reports, test runs, submission syncer daemon (Plane + GitHub integration).

title: Dev Tools Panel + Widget
description: Floating dev tools widget with version info, changelog tab, quick login, runtime-gated by RequireDevtools plug.

title: OpsDOC Strategy Report
description: 9-wave product strategy formation: company research, positioning, economics, roadmap, market research. Notion bidirectional sync.

title: Azure CI/CD Pipeline
description: GitHub Actions: build > migrate > deploy > health check. ARM64 Docker, Azure Container Apps, ACR registry.

title: Staging Environment
description: Separate ACR + Container App for develop branch. Branch-based deployment: develop > staging, main > production.
